# Support

Need help? Here's where to go:

- **Questions & discussion** — open a
  [GitHub Discussion](../../discussions).
- **Bugs & feature requests** — open a
  [GitHub Issue](../../issues/new/choose).
- **Security issues** — see [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md) (report privately).

This is an open-source project maintained on a best-effort basis. Please be
respectful and patient.
